item.name: Search & Match
Create a document from raw data

request.name: Create a document from raw data

description.content:
Creates a document directly from structured resume or job description data for use in Search & Match functionality. This endpoint is specifically designed for programmatic document creation without file uploads.
If you want to upload a document with a file or URL, see the main [POST /v3/documents](#post-/v3/documents) endpoint under the Documents tag.
When successful, returns an `identifier` in the response for subsequent use with the [/documents/{identifier}](#get-/v3/documents/-identifier-) endpoint to check processing status and retrieve results.

query.description: Whether to return the response in snake_case instead of camelCase. Default is false.

variable.description: The instance region. Use 'api' for AUS/Global, 'api.us1' for US, or 'api.eu1' for EU. You can find your region in the Affinda web app URL. (This can only be one of api,api.eu1,api.us1)

response.name: Only returned when wait=True, will return the created document

variable.description: The instance region. Use 'api' for AUS/Global, 'api.us1' for US, or 'api.eu1' for EU. You can find your region in the Affinda web app URL. (This can only be one of api,api.eu1,api.us1)

item.name: Search through parsed resumes

request.name: Search through parsed resumes

description.content:
Searches through parsed resumes. Users have 3 options to create a search:

1. Match to a job description - a parsed job description is used to find candidates that suit it
2. Match to a resume - a parsed resume is used to find other candidates that have similar attributes
3. Search using custom criteria

Users should only populate 1 of jobDescription, resume or the custom criteria.

query.description: The number of documents to skip before starting to collect the result set.
The numbers of results to return.

variable.description: The instance region. Use 'api' for AUS/Global, 'api.us1' for US, or 'api.eu1' for EU. You can find your region in the Affinda web app URL. (This can only be one of api,api.eu1,api.us1)

item.name: Match a single resume and job description

request.name: Match a single resume and job description

description.content:
Get the matching score between a resume and a job description. The score ranges between 0 and 1, with 0 being not a match at all, and 1 being perfect match.
Note, this score will not directly match the score returned from POST [/resume_search/details/{identifier}](#post-/resume_search/details/-identifier-).

query.description: (Required) Identify the resume to match.
(Required) Identify the job description to match.
Optionally, specify an index to search in. If not specified, will search in all indexes.
Add keywords to the search criteria.
How important is this criteria to the matching score, range from 0 to 1.
How important is this criteria to the matching score, range from 0 to 1.
How important is this criteria to the matching score, range from 0 to 1.
How important is this criteria to the matching score, range from 0 to 1.
How important is this criteria to the matching score, range from 0 to 1.

How important is this criteria to the matching score, range from 0 to 1.

body.raw:
{
  "allowPdfDownload": "<boolean>",
  "maxResults": "<integer>",
  "displayJobTitle": "<boolean>",
  "displayLocation": "<boolean>",
  "displayYearsExperience": "<boolean>",
  "displayOccupationGroup": "<boolean>",
  "displayEducation": "<boolean>",
  "displaySkills": "<boolean>",
  "displayLanguages": "<boolean>",
  "displayManagementLevel": "<boolean>",
  "displayKeywords": "<boolean>",
  "weightJobTitle": "<number>",
  "weightLocation": "<number>",
  "weightYearsExperience": "<number>",
  "weightOccupationGroup": "<number>",
  "weightEducation": "<number>",
  "weightSkills": "<number>",
  "weightLanguages": "<number>",
  "weightManagementLevel": "<number>",
  "weightKeywords": "<number>",
  "indices": [
    "<string>",
    "<string>"
  ],
  "showIndexDropdown": "<boolean>",
  "searchToolTheme": "<object>",
  "actions": [
    {
      "label": "<string>",
      "eventName": "<string>"
    },
    {
      "label": "<string>",
      "eventName": "<string>"
    }
  ],
  "hideToolbar": "<boolean>",
  "hideSidePanel": "<boolean>",
  "customFieldsConfig": [
    {
      "dataPoint": "<string>",
      "weight": 0.5
    },
    {
      "dataPoint": "<string>",
      "weight": 0.5
    }
  ],
  "distanceUnit": "<string>"
}
